steps: CW structure: one 0-cell $v$, two 1-cells $a, b$, one 2-cell $e$ with attaching word $abab^{-1}$.

$d_2(e)$: $a$ appears at positions 1 and 3, both with positive orientation, giving coefficient $+2$. $b$ appears at position 2 (positive) and position 4 as $b^{-1}$ (negative), giving coefficient $0$. Thus $d_2(e) = 2a$.
$H_2 = \ker(d_2: \mathbb{Z} \to \mathbb{Z}\langle a\rangle \oplus \mathbb{Z}\langle b\rangle)$. The map $e \mapsto (2, 0)$ is injective, so $H_2 = 0$.
$H_0 = \mathbb{Z}$. As expected for a non-orientable surface: $H_2 = 0$.
